---
title: "example"
format: html
editor: visual
author: Chenghuiyu Fan
---

## This is a file for ETC5513 Assignment2

Cherry blossoms drift down into the soil,\
feeding the roots —\
next year they bloom again.

Rivers pour into the sea,\
time flows on like the water —\
yet it gathers into cloud, turns to rain,\
and returns to the mountains and streams.

Even where the land ends in an endless white,\
the eternal cycle never stills.\
Beneath the snow,\
shoots of spring are already beginning to push through.
